meta.title: GoalsPay — Reach your goals 3x faster
meta.description: Savings app with visual goals, streaks and achievements. 100% private: your data stays on your phone. 14 LATAM currencies. Free, no ads.
meta.ogDescription: The goals app that turns your savings into visible progress.

hero.title: Reach your goals 3x faster. Without handing your bank to anyone.
hero.subtitle: GoalsPay is the savings app with streaks, achievements and real privacy. Your money stays on your phone — only.
hero.screenAlt: GoalsPay main screen showing goals and progress

features.title: Built so saving stops being boring
features.subtitle: Every feature is designed to keep your motivation alive, not to surveil your account.

photoGoals.title: Goals with a photo
photoGoals.desc: Set the photo of the product, trip or dream you're saving for. Your brain cheers what it sees.

streaks.title: Daily streaks
streaks.desc: Every deposit counts. Build an unstoppable streak and don't drop it.

achievements.title: 12 unlockable achievements
achievements.desc: From First step to Unstoppable. Gamification that actually works.

projection.title: Smart projection
projection.desc: We tell you how much you need per week or per day to hit your target date.

widget.title: Android widget
widget.desc: See your progress right from your home screen. No app to open.

privacy.title: Data on your phone
privacy.desc: No server. No account. Optional backup to your own Google Drive.

currencies.title: 14 LATAM currencies
currencies.desc: USD, MXN, GTQ, NIO, CRC, PAB, HNL, BRL, VEF, DOP, ARS, PYG, CLP and EUR.

modes.title: Switch between Goals and Finance with a single tap
modes.subtitle: Two dedicated views for two different ways to think about your money.

goals.title: Save for what matters
goals.desc: Create goals with amount, date and photo. Deposit whenever you can and watch the bar grow.
bullets: Category, target date and product photo
Deposit history with notes and photos

finance.title: Manage incomes and fixed expenses
finance.desc: Track your recurring incomes and monthly expenses. See how much you have left.
bullets: Smart suggestion of how much you can deposit to your goals

achievements.title: Every deposit unlocks something
achievements.subtitle: 12 unlockable achievements and streaks up to 30 days. The brain cheers what it sees.

privacy.title: Your data never leaves your phone. Period.
privacy.subtitle: GoalsPay doesn't need your bank, your email, or your password. It works offline.
bullets: No login, no server, no tracking
Optional backup to YOUR own Google Drive
Lock with fingerprint or Face ID

items.a: Yes. The current version is free and ad-free. If we ever launch a premium plan, what you have today stays free.

items.q: Do I need to connect my bank?
items.a: No. GoalsPay never connects to any bank. You decide what to deposit and the app tracks it.
We support 14 currencies: USD, EUR, MXN, GTQ, NIO, CRC, PAB, HNL, BRL, VEF, DOP, ARS, PYG and CLP.
You can enable backup to your own Google Drive and restore your data on the new device.
Yes. All information lives on your phone. You only need the internet if you enable backup.

items.q: When will it be on Play Store and App Store?
items.a: Publication is in progress. For now you can download the APK directly from here.

finalCta.title: Start saving today in under 30 seconds.
finalCta.subtitle: Download the APK, open the app, create your first goal. That simple.
finalCta.hint: No signup · No bank connection · No ads

footer.madeIn: © {year} GoalsPay. Made with love in LATAM.

downloadToast.missingBody: The APK will be available very soon. Check back in a few days.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: GoalsPay does not collect, store or transmit your financial data to any server. Every piece of information you record (goals, deposits, incomes, expenses) lives exclusively on your device. The only exchange with external services happens when you opt in to the Google Drive backup — and it goes straight to YOUR account, not ours. We don't use identifying analytics, we don't ship ad SDKs, we don't share data with third parties. Questions? Email contact@goalspay.app.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.body: GoalsPay is offered as-is, free and without warranties. It is not a substitute for professional financial advice. You are responsible for your saving decisions. The app may stop receiving updates at any time. Questions? Email contact@goalspay.app.
